title: Federal Reserve Monetary Policy Report - Archive Index

source.name: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System

summary: This source is a navigation/index page listing historical Monetary Policy Report links from 1996 to 2025. It contains no substantive content from any actual report—no policy discussions, economic data, or analysis. The page merely enumerates dates and document formats (HTML/PDF) available for each reporting period.
key_points: Source is a container/listing page, not an actual Monetary Policy Report
Contains only navigation links organized by date (1996-2025)
No actual policy content, economic data, or analysis present
Reports are submitted semiannually to Senate Banking and House Financial Services committees
No specific monetary policy positions, economic figures, or forward guidance included
why_it_matters: This page has no standalone archival value for research purposes. It provides no actionable information about monetary policy, economic developments, or market-relevant content. Actual reports must be accessed via individual document links.

issues_found: Source is a listing/navigation page (container page) containing only links to historical Monetary Policy Reports, not actual report content
No substantive monetary policy analysis, economic data, or policy discussion present
Per Rule 8: listing_page type must not be accepted
Per Rule 9: container pages should bias toward reject, not accept
Archive value is too low - this page serves only as a directory index
Individual Monetary Policy Reports must be accessed via separate document links

notes: LOW QUALITY SOURCE: This is a pure navigation/index page for the Federal Reserve's Monetary Policy Report archive. It contains only date-organized links to HTML and PDF documents with no actual report content. Per Rule 9, listing pages should be treated as non-archiveable. The actual Monetary Policy Reports (submitted semiannually per the Federal Reserve Act) contain substantive policy discussions and economic analysis that would be appropriate for archival—but this page is merely a directory to those reports. Human review recommended to confirm this page should not be individually archived.
